rule CDB_MessagePackCSharp_LZ4_decompression_allo {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for MessagePack-CSharp: LZ4 decompression allocates from unbounded declared output l"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-25"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "MessagePack" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-11999 - X.509 trust-chain bypass via path-depth exh"; content:"CVE-2026-11999"; nocase; sid:6900825; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
